_comment: Template for the LIFE session's container.json. Copy to groups/telos-life/container.json on mini and fill in:
- agentGroupId: the UUID generated when creating the agent_group row in the central DB
- additionalMounts.hostPath values: absolute host paths on mini
Fields starting with _ are documentation, ignored by the runtime (extra fields are tolerated by readContainerConfig).
- mcp-server.ts lives ONCE at /Users/daniel/Desktop/telos/shared/telos-tools/ in the fork (mini path: <fork-checkout>/shared/telos-tools/).
- Each Telos session group (telos / telos-learn / telos-life) mounts that dir RO at /workspace/extra/telos-tools/.
- The MCP command points there, not at /workspace/agent/tools/ (groups/telos-life/ has no tools/ dir of its own).
- Mount-allowlist on mini must include the shared/telos-tools/ host path. Update mount-allowlist.json before first spawn.

additionalMounts._comment: Shared Telos MCP server (RO). Single source of truth across work/learn/life.
Constantia repo (RW). Same mount as work and learn sessions — shared cross-agent state.
This LIFE session's own DB dir (RO). Used by read_today_transcript to read life-chat history. Distinct from work and learn session DBs.
Constantia git deploy key (RO). Same key as work and learn sessions.
